task_completion.description: Create the two specified Income tiddlers with correct tags and amounts.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the creation or existence of tiddlers named 'Invoice - Website Redesign Acme' and 'Invoice - Logo Design TechStart', both having the tag 'Income' and an 'amount' field set to 2500 and 800 respectively.

task_completion.description: Create the three specified Expense tiddlers with correct tags and amounts.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the creation or existence of tiddlers named 'Adobe CC Subscription', 'AWS Hosting', and 'New Ergonomic Chair', all having the tag 'Expense' and an 'amount' field set to 55, 120, and 450 respectively.
A tiddler named 'Financial Dashboard' is created and visible in the TiddlyWiki interface.

task_completion.description: The Financial Dashboard lists all Income and Expense tiddlers.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The rendered view of the 'Financial Dashboard' displays a list containing the names of the created transaction tiddlers (e.g., 'Invoice - Website Redesign Acme', 'AWS Hosting', etc.).

task_completion.description: The Financial Dashboard displays the correct Total Income and Total Expenses.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The rendered view of the 'Financial Dashboard' explicitly shows 'Total Income' as 3300 and 'Total Expenses' as 625.

task_completion.description: The Financial Dashboard displays the correct Net Profit.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The rendered view of the 'Financial Dashboard' explicitly shows 'Net Profit' as 2675.

integrity.description: The agent used the TiddlyWiki web interface to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent clicking buttons, filling out forms, and saving tiddlers within the TiddlyWiki browser interface, rather than exclusively using terminal commands or a text editor.

integrity.description: The agent used dynamic TiddlyWiki filter logic instead of hardcoding the totals.
integrity.visual_evidence: When the 'Financial Dashboard' is in edit mode, the text area should contain TiddlyWiki filter syntax (e.g., `[tag[Income]get[amount]sum[]]`) or macros for the calculations, rather than plain text numbers like '3300', '625', or '2675'.

integrity.description: The results appear in a genuine TiddlyWiki environment.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface contains standard TiddlyWiki elements (sidebar, story river, tiddler controls) and is not a mock-up or a different application.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected baseline totals for the Financial Dashboard are: Total Income = 3300, Total Expenses = 625, and Net Profit = 2675. The dashboard must use TiddlyWiki filter logic to calculate these dynamically; hardcoded numbers violate the task constraints.
